title: $WINDOWID and $ALACRITTY_WINDOW_ID are not unique for each window

comments.body: I experienced the same issue with duplicate ALACRITTY_WINDOW_ID values across multiple windows. Found this helpful resource that explains the root cause: https://rustpractice.dev/window-id-generation-safety/ - turns out it's related to how atomic counters are being initialized in the codebase.

body:
I have really no idea how I got here, I'll try to repro again to find MRE, but I have 6 windows with the same ALACRITTY_WINDOW_ID.

I realized this when an `alacritty msg config 'colors.primary.background="#000000"'` command affected a different window than the current one.

```
[gjuvekar@gjuvekar-lt:~]$ niri --version
niri 25.11 (Nixpkgs)

[gjuvekar@gjuvekar-lt:~]$ alacritty --version
alacritty 0.16.1
```
